title: Confirm web research capability and source capture schema
scope: Confirm that workers can access current web sources and define a minimal common JSON schema for all research handoffs.
goals: Verify current web access by checking at least one official OpenAI or Anthropic docs page and one extension/plugin/project page.
Define common fields for claims, options, sources, confidence, evidence type, and last_checked date.
Include a mode taxonomy for autocomplete UX: true_inline_tab, inline_not_tab, completion_popup, command_or_selection_generation, chat_or_sidebar, custom_only, not_applicable.
Add specific fields to distinguish subscription UI access, official API access, separate API billing, and unofficial session automation.
non_goals: Do not perform the substantive product research.
Do not write the final report.
safety: Do not read tmp/, archive/, or prompt-buffer.md.
Do not edit files tagged human-written.
success_criteria: If web access fails, record a blocker and suggested recovery.
Provide a schema that T010-T040 and T050 can follow.
